title: Steamhappy Totem of Undying Reskin
description: This resourcepack changes the texture for the Totem of Undying item to the iconic Steamhappy Steam emoji!
body:
# This resourcepack aims to replace the default Totem of Undying texture with a Steamhappy face. 

It started as a Steam platform emoji around 2014, later updated in 2020 to its current vibrant design, sparking community discussions and memes.

It's used in Discord servers, fan wikis, and even satirical "religions" online, with high-quality variants and Roblox obbies centered around it

**Reskin made by TheTacBac**

**Uploaded to Modrinth by pupi.zz**

![Player holding Retextured Totem of Undying as a Steamhappy face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a4a2638e3d74bf943f45340db01cb20038fb3c1_0.webp)
